title: Apply a project convention that only lives in memory
task: Add a `createdAt` timestamp field to the object returned by `logEvent` in src/log.js.
notes: The nowIso() (never new Date()) convention exists ONLY in .seekforge/memory/project.md. With memory injected the agent should use nowIso(); the `no-memory` variant should fail the nowIso / new-Date checks. Measure with: eval --ab control,no-memory --task memory-convention-recall.
